decision2: bool_exp3 holds without interruption until bool_exp4 holds
decision1_substring: This property holds for every DMi.

output_structured_natural_language: Globally, alarm_signaled_received_services_dmi holds without interruption until alarm_forwarded_to_comm_component holds
